title: Amtech S0615 600mm (24") Bungee cord with spring loaded clips
features: SPRING-LOADED CLIPS: This heavy duty 600mm (24"), 8mm diameter bungee cord has spring-loaded carabiner clips at either end
MULTIPLE USES: It is ideal for the quick and convenient binding of loads around the home and workplace
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Bungee with carabiner clips See more
